Commands Info
.clan : Set privileges for access withdraw items from warehouse
.party : Information about your party (Show rates and level party members)
.action-on : Enable auto-attack after using the skill. (Auto-attack works only at specific skills)
.action-off : Disable auto-attack after using the skill.
.dressme : Visual change your equip appearance
.showequip : Show real equip appearance (Command work only 30 sec)
.offline : Sets Offline Private Store
.repair : Repairing character located in current account
.ping : Check your ping to the server or proxy
.whoiam : Show full character stats
.cfg : Personal settings for character
.exp : Show information about needs experience to next level
.whereis : Set radar to your party or clan member (Syntaxes .whereis Name)
.loc : Display target cords and distance
.date : Show server real date and time
.augments : Show information about augmentation in your equip
.offbuff : Sets offline private store buff
.engage : Offer marries to target
